articles.author: Laura Paddison, Mitchell McCluskey, Andrew Freedman, Taylor Ward
articles.title: Live updates: Temperature records broken across Europe as countries issue health alerts - CNN
articles.description: Punishing temperatures are scorching Europe as it swelters under a fierce heat dome, bringing dangerous conditions to swaths of the fastest-warming continent. Follow for live updates.
articles.content: Heat is the deadliest type of extreme weather, and the human-caused climate crisis is making heat waves more severe and prolonged. Coupled with high humidity, conditions in some places are approachin… [+1472 chars]
